PROJECT SCO

Modular & configurable — one engine, any brand

The same standard self-checkout, reconfigured live. Pick a tenant, recolor / rebrand / upload a logo, switch the theme mode, and toggle standard functions — every screen, the flow and the payment options update. Below is the config that would drive a real lane.
